# services.alerta

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.alerta`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.alerta.authenticationRequired` | `boolean` | Whether users must authenticate when using the web UI or command-line tool |
| `services.alerta.bind` | `string` | Address to bind to. The default is to bind to all addresses |
| `services.alerta.corsOrigins` | `list of string` | List of URLs that can access the API for Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) |
| `services.alerta.databaseName` | `string` | Name of the database instance to connect to |
| `services.alerta.databaseUrl` | `string` | URL of the MongoDB or PostgreSQL database to connect to |
| `services.alerta.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable alerta. |
| `services.alerta.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | These lines go into alertad.conf verbatim. |
| `services.alerta.logDir` | `absolute path` | Location where the logfiles are stored |
| `services.alerta.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of Alerta |
| `services.alerta.signupEnabled` | `boolean` | Whether to prevent sign-up of new users via the web UI |
